title: My subscription
description: Your VetSaaS plan, service status, and renewal dates.

alerts.ok: Your subscription is up to date. Check the next charge date to plan renewal.
alerts.yellow: Your next charge is within 7 days. Review your plan and renew on time.
alerts.amber: Only a few days left until the next charge. Renew soon to avoid interruptions.
alerts.red: Your subscription expires very soon or has expired. Renew as soon as possible.
alerts.danger: Your subscription needs immediate attention. Contact support or renew your plan.
alerts.muted: If you have questions about your plan or dates, contact Orvae support.

modal.title: Your subscription is about to expire
modal.description: Plan {{plan}} needs renewal before the next charge.

renew_hint: Payment is processed on Orvae's secure portal. Once confirmed, your access is extended automatically.
no_renewal_url: No payment link is configured yet. Contact support to renew your plan.
support: If you need to change plans or have a pending charge, contact the Orvae team.

comprobantes.title: Electronic receipts
comprobantes.description: Boletas, invoices, and notes issued in your billing period (production mode only).
comprobantes.production_only: Receipts issued in sandbox (test) mode are not counted.
comprobantes.period_reset_hint: The counter resets when you renew your plan from Orvae (new subscription period).
comprobantes.overage_hint: Over included quota: {{blocks}} block(s) of {{block}} receipts × S/. {{price}} each.
comprobantes.annual_over_title: You exceeded the annual included quota
comprobantes.annual_over_hint: You can keep issuing receipts. Contact Orvae to review your plan or quota.
comprobantes.allow_overage: When you reach the included limit you can still issue receipts; on monthly plans every extra 100 adds S/. 8.00 to your bill.

usage.title: Plan usage
usage.description: Current usage against your subscription limits (includes extras if Orvae assigned any).

bot_ia.activated_mid_cycle: Activated on {{activated}}. The {{price}} charge is added on renewal on {{renewal}}, together with your plan (no separate billing cycle).
bot_ia.description_active: Included in your VetSaaS subscription. Manage it under Communications → AI assistant.
bot_ia.description_inactive: Optional add-on. If enabled, it is billed on the same date as your plan.

renewal_billing.total_hint: Includes agreed plan price, subscription add-ons, and extra invoices for the current period.
